# /implement

> Drive implementation for a feature whose tasks are validated (`TASK_VALIDATED` APPROVED). Emits CE artefacts under `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/output/` — solution.xml, plugin assemblies, JS modules, PCF folders, Canvas .msapp exports, Pages YAML, PA flow JSON.

## Usage

```
/implement [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--task <slug>] [--complete]
```

- Bare `/implement` works through tasks in dependency order; suspends on user-input required.
- `--task <slug>` implements one task only.
- `--complete` finalises: validates all tasks emitted artefacts; transitions `IMPLEMENTING → IMPLEMENTED`.

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/tasks/*.task.md` (gate `TASK_VALIDATED` APPROVED)
- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/tdd.md` (technical reference)
- `project.config.yaml` (publisher prefix, solution name)
- [constitution/01-model-driven-standards.md](../../constitution/01-model-driven-standards.md) and siblings — coding standards apply during generation

## Execution flow

1. Resolve feature; assert `TASK_VALIDATED` is APPROVED.
2. Build dependency graph from task dependency lists; topologically sort.
3. For each task:
   - Read task card + relevant TDD section
   - Generate / modify CE artefacts per [constitution/01-model-driven-standards.md](../../constitution/01-model-driven-standards.md) (plugins / JS / BPF / workflows / etc.) or relevant sub-platform constitution file
   - Write artefacts under `output/{artefact-type}/{name}`
   - Update task card frontmatter `implementation-status: done`; append artefact paths
4. On `--complete`:
   - Run `doc_lint` on every output `.md` artefact (e.g., solution metadata)
   - Validate unit-test policy: where `unit-test: required`, fail if no test file alongside the artefact
   - Update `.workflow.json`: `currentStates` += `IMPLEMENTED`; remove `IMPLEMENTING`

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/output/**` — generated artefacts
- Task cards updated with `implementation-status`
- `.workflow.json` updated
